headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold Rating on Estée Lauder (EL)
summary: The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) is one of the 11 Best Consumer Staples Stocks to Invest In. On April 23, 2026, TD Cowen lowered its price target on The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) to $85 from $95 and maintained a Hold rating as part of a broader Q1 preview for beauty companies. The […]
